differential_diagnoses: Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE) with neuropsychiatric and pulmonary involvement
next_steps: Check serum complement levels (C3, C4) and anti-dsDNA antibodies
Check antiphospholipid antibody profile (lupus anticoagulant, anticardiolipin, anti-beta-2-glycoprotein 1)
Perform transesophageal echocardiography to evaluate for valvular vegetations
Peripheral blood smear review for schistocytes
Consider skin or tissue biopsy of involved organs if clinically stable
Initiate high-dose glucocorticoid therapy pending autoimmune workup results
